scripts.dev: concurrently --names bridge,agent,slack,gtm --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w packages/bridge" "npm run dev -w packages/agent" "npm run dev -w packages/slack-bridge" "npm run dev -w packages/gtm-agent"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/bridge && npm run build -w packages/agent && npm run build -w packages/slack-bridge && npm run build -w packages/gtm-agent
